title: Starbucks: There Is Still Room For Growth
text: Starbucks has a wide moat and several growth catalysts ahead, such as expansion in Asia and partnerships with Nestle and Amazon, which are not fully priced in. The company's reinvention plan, focusing on customization, plant-based food and beverages, and sustainability, could also unlock productivity gains and improve margins. Despite potential risks, such as heavy dependence on Asia for growth and the threat of unions, the stock is rated a buy with a target price of $112.86 and an upside potential of 10.79%.

title: Starbucks Stock: Slowly Approaching An Attractive Entry Point
